theme_archetype.description: Enterprise-grade, authoritative, and precise. Designed for legal tech and compliance officers. Focuses on stark contrasts, strict grids, and clear typography over decorative elements.

primary.name: True Black
primary.usage: Primary CTA backgrounds, headings, structural borders

accent.name: International Klein Blue
accent.usage: Hover states, active data points, highlight indicators

heading.usage: H1, H2, H3, large stat numbers

mono.usage: Overlines, tags, data points, 'Health Score' values

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous Tailwind spacing: p-6, p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32. Ensure containers with borders have internal padding of at least p-8.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode A: 'Tetris' Bento Grid for features. Base grid md:grid-cols-8. Wide gaps gap-8.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for text in hero and features to enforce an editorial, document-like feel. No centered text blocks unless explicitly for a single closing CTA.

surface_styles.cards: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look). border border-black/10 background-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-none. On hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-[0_8px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-transform duration-200.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide hover:bg-[#002FA7] transition-colors duration-200 ease-out
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-black border-2 border-black rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all duration-200 ease-out

sections_and_components.navigation: Sticky nav with a hard bottom border (border-b border-black/10) and backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80. Logo on left, links on right, 'Enterprise Access' CTA button on far right.

hero.layout: Massive left-aligned typography. H1 must be bold and commanding. Subheadline in Satoshi. Two CTAs side-by-side.
hero.visual: A raw, technical aesthetic using the abstract architectural images as a subdued, greyscale background overlay with opacity-20.

sections_and_components.trust_bar: Monochrome sponsor/tech logos (Groq, Llama 3, ChromaDB, LangChain) displayed in an 'Editorial Ribbon' format, spaced generously (gap-24), opacity-50.
sections_and_components.features_bento:
Asymmetric bento grid. 
- 'Instant Legal Audits' (col-span-1 md:col-span-8)
- 'Compliance Health Score' (col-span-1 md:col-span-4)
- 'Privacy-First Architecture' (col-span-1 md:col-span-4)
- 'Board-Ready Reports' (col-span-1 md:col-span-8 or 4)
sections_and_components.how_it_works: 3-step list with large typography numbers (01, 02, 03) in IBM Plex Mono. Left-aligned, heavy bottom borders separating each step.
sections_and_components.footer: Dark background (bg-black text-white) to contrast the light body. Massive 'LexGuard' text (text-[10vw]). Simple links. 'Built by Sujal Meena' credit.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons and cards must have distinct hover states. Use sharp, mechanical transitions (ease-out duration-200) not springy bouncy ones.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_reveal: Since it's pure JS/HTML, use a simple IntersectionObserver to add 'opacity-100 translate-y-0' to elements on scroll. Keep it minimal.

hero_background.usage: Use as a very faint background pattern behind the hero section (opacity-10 or 20, mix-blend-multiply).

feature_visual_1.usage: Use within the 'Privacy-First Architecture' bento card as a structural background, with a dark gradient overlay for text readability.

feature_visual_2.usage: Use within the 'Board-Ready Reports' card to emphasize structure and scale.

logos.instructions: Use inline SVG logos or text-based typographic logos for Llama 3, Groq, ChromaDB, LangChain. Do not use placeholder image URLs. Keep them monochrome black.

icons.library: Use Phosphor Icons (via unpkg CDN since it's vanilla HTML/JS: `<script src="https://unpkg.com/@phosphor-icons/web"></script>`).

implementation_notes_for_agent.stack: Pure HTML, Tailwind CSS (via CDN or local build), Vanilla JS. Do NOT use React/Shadcn.
implementation_notes_for_agent.design_feel: Avoid typical 'AI slop' (purple gradients, glowing blobs). LexGuard is an enterprise legal tool. Make it look like a high-end financial or architectural firm's website—sharp lines, monochromatic palette, high contrast, immense typographical hierarchy.
